items.title: The Phoenix Suns will exercise the $2.58 million non-guaranteed team option on Jamaree Bouyea for the 2026-27 season, league sources told HoopsHype. Bouyea averaged 5.7 points on 45.8 percent shooting from the field in 46 games with the Suns last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Phoenix Suns will exercise the $2.58 million non-guaranteed team option on Jamaree Bouyea for the 2026-27 season, league sources told HoopsHype. Bouyea averaged 5.7 points on 45.8 percent shooting from the field in 46 games with the Suns last season.

items.title: By my projections Suns will be roughly $4.6M under the tax and $12.6M under the first apron after re-signing Collin Gillespie. Can create more room if they move on from Haywood Highsmith and/or Jamaree Bouyea.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
By my projections Suns will be roughly $4.6M under the tax and $12.6M under the first apron after re-signing Collin Gillespie. Can create more room if they move on from Haywood Highsmith and/or Jamaree Bouyea.
It'll get tight to avoid the first apron if they re-sign Mark Williams and Jordan Goodwin.
